cleared_note: Cleared 2026-07-20 on Cole's instruction. Held 6563 items, 100% pending, back to 2026-05-24. 81% were nova_memory_db/ (LanceDB storage churn) — the audit read raw git diff and never applied the watcher's own exclusion lists. Root cause fixed in watcher.py (AUDIT_EXCLUDE_PREFIXES) and audit_queue.py (_prune now caps pending too). Replay showed 89.9% of these would never have been queued.
